\tzpentry{ID3466}{Grav Charge Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3466 introduces Grav Charge Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ Q_{\text{grav}}(t) \;=\; \int_{-\infty}^t \big(\partial_\tau I(\tau) - \partial_\tau S(\tau)\big)\; e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}}\, d\tau \]
